description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:8.0 Docker image and a global variable project set to NoData, with stages build, test, and publish. In the build stage add a build job that sets a build_path variable to $project, runs `cd $build_path` then `dotnet build --no-incremental -v q /warnaserror`. In the test stage add a test job that sets test_path to $project.Tests, runs `cd $test_path` then `dotnet test`. In the publish stage add a publish job targeting the production environment, limited to the master branch, that also sets build_path to $project and runs `cd $build_path`, `rm -rf bin`, `dotnet pack -v q /warnaserror -c Release`, `cd bin/Release`, and `dotnet nuget push ./*.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key $NUGET`.
